welcome_body: Our missionaries are teaching people who could use a friend — a real one, who stays after the missionaries transfer.
data_privacy: We keep just those things. No address, no finances, no family details.
days_prompt: What days are you usually free in the evening?
days_also_day: Also free during the day? Tap to add
styles_prompt: Missionaries need different kinds of help. What are you happy to do?
style_invite_to_activity: Invite a friend to an activity
confirm_title: Got it! Here's what we have:
confirm_nudge: We'll text you every Sunday — just a quick check-in. You can always adjust.
